title: Yellow Lab established by bowl
goal: Establish the yellow Lab, the food bowl, and the clean advert setting before the transformation begins.

title: Yellow Lab settles into feeding setup
goal: Hold the yellow Lab and bowl in a stable readable composition that cleanly hands off into the eating action.

title: Yellow Lab lowers to eat
goal: Show the yellow Lab beginning to eat from the bowl so the product interaction is unmistakable.

title: Yellow Lab actively eating
goal: End on a clear feeding moment that sets up the transformation trigger and flows into the magical change.

title: Transformation begins from yellow to brown
goal: Anchor the start of the impossible change while preserving the same dog presence, posture, and feeding setup.

title: Brown Lab completes the transformation
goal: Land the transformation clearly with the dog now fully brown in the same scene and position.

title: Brown Lab revealed by bowl
goal: Begin the final after-state shot with the brown Lab calm, readable, and clearly transformed.

title: Brown Lab hero end image
goal: Finish on a polished, simple after-image that lets the transformed brown Lab register as the final memorable payoff.
